data.description:
## Reproduction Steps
- tests/interfaces/contracts/test_event_schema_forward_compat.py:124 asserts only future_path.exists() after compaction. A regression that truncated/rewrote the file contents while keeping the path would PASS.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Re-read the event file post-compaction and assert event["data"]["<future_field>"] == value and event_type preserved
- [ ] Assert the compaction SNAPSHOT did not absorb the unknown FUTURE_UUID event
- [ ] Test fails if forward-compat payloads are dropped/rewritten
data.title: Forward-compat test must assert payload preservation, not just file existence
